Potassium Blood Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a potassium blood test? 
A potassium blood test measures the amount of potassium in your blood. Potassium is a type of electrolyte . Electrolytes are electrically charged minerals Â that help control the amount of fluids and the balance of acids and bases (pH balance) in your body. They also help control muscle and nerve activity and perform other important func
